channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Litter Bin is full near metal street barrier & start of footpath, 9th March
item.description:
The litter bin at the edge of pavement & at the start of footpath from Magpie Hall Lane, this bin is now full and cannot take anymore rubbish. Well used due to schools & dog walkers. Also is it possible to have a sweep up of the road gutters and pavements located around the recycling bins and this litter bin, area looks very tatty. Many, Many thanks.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Magpie Hall Lane, Bromley Common, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Clean please, 9th March
item.description:
Hi we need you clean on the street and never clean many year. We clean too tired you need check thank you.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Eugenia Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dog Fouling, 9th March
item.description:
There is constantly dog fouling from the entrance to Pond Farm Estate on Mildenhall Road to the junction on Chailey St and also in the shortcut passage through the estate. This morning it was so bad that the pavement was almost unusable.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Pond Farm Estate, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Spray paint on ground, 9th March
item.description:
A spray paint graffiti has been on the pavement for a number of weeks now and needs to be removed.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Denbigh Close, Elmstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Potholes forming at the entrance of the School, 9th March
item.description:
Potholes forming at the entrance of the School, please can these be repaired. Also the barrier on Mapgie Hall lane nearest to the A21 is bent and needs repairing also. Many Thanks
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Magpie Hall Lane, Bromley Common, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Caravan left in the road but also covering pavement, 9th March
item.description:
Causes obstruction with 2 way traffic

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Crabtree Manorway North, Lower Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflowing poo, 9th March
item.description:
There is poo everywhere

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Ashridge Crescent, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A Fly-tip Large - More than 10 black bags problem has been found, 9th March
item.description:
A Fly-tip Large - More than 10 black bags problem has been found by Brent Council

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Dyne Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Large - More than a van load (Estates)

item.title: A board not next to shop, 9th March
item.description:
All shops constantly told about their a boards. Yet this shop is let of

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 148-154, High Street, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Biohazard human poo on playground, 9th March
item.description:
In the playground Human poo Please help us keep this environment clean

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): De Beauvoir Square, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Vandalised pavement parking/no parking signs x 4, 9th March
item.description:
The two signs at the end of Blythe Hill closest to Breakspeares Drive have been obliterated with blue paint (again). Also the sign in Breakespeares directly opposite Blythe Hill, and the next one along, at the junction of Breakespeares and Midfield Way. Four in total.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Blythe Hill, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Road breaking with potholes, 9th March
item.description:
This was repaired recently in February but this has disintegrated badly again.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Blackbrook Lane, Bickley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 9th March
item.description:
Black sacks left on grass verge outside 3 The Avenue
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, The Sanctuary, Blendon, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bins constantly overflowing and taking up pavement space, 9th March
item.description:
The recycling bins are constantly overflowing and misused.. Residents have key fob access to the bin store on the North East corner of Therfield Court (facing east). Please can the bins be relocated to the internal bin store?

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brownswood Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 9th March
item.description:
Fly tipping

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Basingdon Way, Dulwich Village, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Contents of flat flytipped, 9th March
item.description:
Furniture and rubbished from Flat 47 Therfield court was emptied out onto the street on Sunday 8 March

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brownswood Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Excessive Litter Windsor Terrace (running from City Road up to Micawber Street and beyond) has not been swept for weeks - including dirty nappies, cardboard boxes, food waste, plastic bottles, dog poo etc day after day., 9th March
item.description:
Excessive Litter Windsor Terrace (running from City Road up to Micawber Street and beyond) has not been swept for weeks - including dirty nappies, cardboard boxes, food waste, plastic bottles, dog poo etc day after day.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Wenlock Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 9th March
item.description:
Fly tipping again at a problem site. Please arrange removal.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Morning Lane, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large pothole on a tight road in front of zebra crossing, 9th March
item.description:
Large pothole with blunt edge which cars cannot avoid as it’s a narrow road and has damaged the suspension of my front right tire on my car.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 269, High Street, Poverest, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Open utility cover on grass verge, 9th March
item.description:
This hole is open, on the verge just downhill from the junction with Grovelands - it doesn't look like the cover could fit it. This is a hazard to pedestrians, especially after dark.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Grovelands Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
